pending_tasks.prompt:
Fix this WorldPulse project health issue: Low test coverage: only 0 test files found

Context: WorldPulse is an open-source global intelligence network (Next.js 15, Fastify,
PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, Meilisearch). Investigate the root cause, implement the fix,
verify the solution works, and add any necessary tests. Do not ask for confirmation.

Add comprehensive test coverage to WorldPulse. Focus on:
1. Critical API routes (auth, signals, feed, search)
2. Scraper pipeline logic (fetch, parse, score)
3. Database query functions
4. Frontend hook utilities

Use Vitest. Each test file should have at least 5 meaningful test cases.
Write tests to /apps/api/src/__tests__/ and /apps/scraper/src/__tests__/.
Do not ask for confirmation.

Add auto-generated API documentation to WorldPulse (apps/api/).

routes. Serve interactive Swagger UI at /api/docs. Generate static openapi.json at
build time to docs/api-reference.json. This helps developer adoption and community
contributions. TypeScript strict, no confirmations.

pending_tasks.phase: Competitive: Multilingual signal support (Arabic, Chinese, Spanish, French, Portuguese)

Competitive: AI content farm / slop detection for reliability scoring
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 29: Implemented AI-generated content heuristic scorer. (1) apps/api/src/lib/ai-content-farms.ts â€” blocklist of 25 known AI content farm domains seeded from NewsGuard/CCDH public reports; (2) apps/api/src/lib/slop-detector.ts â€” SlopDetector class with scoreSignal() method: domain blocklist (+0.40), missing byline (+0.15), clickbait title patterns (+0.10), thin content <100 chars (+0.10), high cadence >10/hr same domain (+0.10), bare URL path (+0.05) â€” score clamped [0,1], Redis 24h cache, singleton export; (3) GET /api/v1/signals/:id/slop-score route added to apps/api/src/routes/signals.ts (admin-only, 30rpm, returns score/flags/isSlop); (4) AISlopBadge component added to apps/web/src/app/signals/[id]/SignalDetailClient.tsx â€” fetches slop-score on mount, shows âš  AI-generated content suspected badge with amber styling when score>=0.7, graceful error handling, admin-only visibility; (5) apps/api/src/__tests__/slop-detector.test.ts â€” 11-case test suite covering all heuristics, cache hit/miss, score clamping, invalidation. Direct open-source alternative to NewsGuard's closed AI content farm detection tool.

completed_tasks.phase: Observability: Sentry error tracking + structured logging + /api/v1/health + OTel tracer
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 33: Implemented 4-part observability suite. (1) apps/api/src/routes/health.ts â€” enhanced GET /api/v1/health with per-service checks: db (SELECT 1), redis (PING), kafka (admin.listTopics, 2s timeout), each returning status ok|degraded|down + latency_ms + error; overall status = down if db down, degraded if kafka/redis degraded, 503 HTTP if db down; (2) apps/api/src/middleware/request-logger.ts â€” Fastify plugin with onRequest (UUID requestId stamping) + onResponse (structured pino log: requestId, userId from JWT, method, route pattern, url, statusCode, latency_ms, ip, userAgent; skips /health /metrics /api/docs noise) + onError (errName, errMsg, statusCode); (3) apps/api/src/lib/sentry.ts â€” optional Sentry wrapper with dynamic require (no hard dep): initSentry(), captureException(), captureMessage(), setSentryUser(), flushSentry(); gracefully no-ops if SENTRY_DSN unset or @sentry/node not installed; (4) apps/scraper/src/lib/tracer.ts â€” lightweight OTel-compatible span tracer using pino structured logs: startSpan(op, fn), startRootSpan(op, fn), Span with traceId/spanId/parentId/operation/attributes/end(). Instrumented processArticleGroup with 3 child spans: pipeline.classify, pipeline.geo, pipeline.verify. Instrumented scrapeAll() with root span scraper.cycle. Updated index.ts: initSentry() + requestLoggerPlugin + /api/v1/health. Updated .env.example with SENTRY_DSN and OTel upgrade notes. Added health.test.ts (11 test cases: checkDb ok/down, checkRedis ok/degraded/down, deriveOverallStatus all combinations).

completed_tasks.phase: P0-2 â€” Make Feed Items Clickable (HIGHEST PRIORITY LAUNCH BLOCKER)
completed_tasks.note: Cycle 34: Fixed P0-2 critical UX blocker. Feed items are now fully clickable. Intelligently skips navigation when clicking buttons, inputs, or action group elements. (2) Verified apps/web/src/app/posts/[id]/page.tsx already fully implemented: fetches post data from GET /api/v1/posts/:id, shows title, author avatar/name, created_at, signal context if linked, replies count, back navigation. (3) Verified apps/web/src/app/explore/page.tsx already correctly routes signal cards to /signals/{id} (line 141). (4) Removed DEMO_DATA from analytics page (apps/web/src/app/analytics/page.tsx): (a) Deleted hardcoded DEMO_DATA const with fake posts/engagement data; (b) Created createEmptyAnalytics() function returning empty data structure; (c) Updated useEffect to fetch from GET /api/v1/analytics/me with Bearer token, set isDemo=false on success, gracefully fallback to empty state on failure; (d) Changed localStorage key from wp_token to wp_access_token for consistency. Feed items now fully clickable â€” entire card surfaces are interactive with proper routing to detail pages. Marketing campaign can proceed.
